segments.text: He called to himself his twelve disciples, and gave them authority over unclean spirits, to cast them out, and to heal every disease and every sickness.
Now the names of the twelve apostles are these. The first, Simon, who is called Peter; Andrew, his brother; James the son of Zebedee; John, his brother;
Philip; Bartholomew; Thomas; Matthew the tax collector; James the son of Alphaeus; Lebbaeus, who was also called Thaddaeus;
Simon the Zealot; and Judas Iscariot, who also betrayed him.
Jesus sent these twelve out and commanded them, saying,
Don’t go among the Gentiles, and don’t enter into any city of the Samaritans.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Rather, go to the lost sheep of the house of Israel.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: As you go, preach, saying, ‘The Kingdom of Heaven is at hand!’
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Heal the sick, cleanse the lepers,  and cast out demons. Freely you received, so freely give.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Don’t take any gold, silver, or brass in your money belts.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Take no bag for your journey, neither two coats, nor sandals, nor staff: for the laborer is worthy of his food.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Into whatever city or village you enter, find out who in it is worthy, and stay there until you go on.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: As you enter into the household, greet it.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If the household is worthy, let your peace come on it, but if it isn’t worthy, let your peace return to you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Whoever doesn’t receive you or hear your words, as you go out of that house or that city, shake the dust off your feet.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Most certainly I tell you, it will be more tolerable for the land of Sodom and Gomorrah in the day of judgment than for that city.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: “Behold, I send you out as sheep among wolves. Therefore be wise as serpents and harmless as doves.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But beware of men, for they will deliver you up to councils, and in their synagogues they will scourge you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Yes, and you will be brought before governors and kings for my sake, for a testimony to them and to the nations.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But when they deliver you up, don’t be anxious how or what you will say, for it will be given you in that hour what you will say.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: For it is not you who speak, but the Spirit of your Father who speaks in you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: “Brother will deliver up brother to death, and the father his child. Children will rise up against parents and cause them to be put to death.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: You will be hated by all men for my name’s sake, but he who endures to the end will be saved.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But when they persecute you in this city, flee into the next, for most certainly I tell you, you will not have gone through the cities of Israel until the Son of Man has come.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: “A disciple is not above his teacher, nor a servant above his lord.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: It is enough for the disciple that he be like his teacher, and the servant like his lord. If they have called the master of the house Beelzebul,  how much more those of his household!
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Therefore don’t be afraid of them, for there is nothing covered that will not be revealed, or hidden that will not be known.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: What I tell you in the darkness, speak in the light; and what you hear whispered in the ear, proclaim on the housetops.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Don’t be afraid of those who kill the body, but are not able to kill the soul. Rather, fear him who is able to destroy both soul and body in Gehenna.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: “Aren’t two sparrows sold for an assarion coin? Not one of them falls to the ground apart from your Father’s will.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But the very hairs of your head are all numbered.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Therefore don’t be afraid. You are of more value than many sparrows.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Everyone therefore who confesses me before men, I will also confess him before my Father who is in heaven.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But whoever denies me before men, I will also deny him before my Father who is in heaven.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: “Don’t think that I came to send peace on the earth. I didn’t come to send peace, but a sword.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: For I came to set a man at odds against his father, and a daughter against her mother, and a daughter-in-law against her mother-in-law.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: A man’s foes will be those of his own household.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: He who loves father or mother more than me is not worthy of me; and he who loves son or daughter more than me isn’t worthy of me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: He who doesn’t take his cross and follow after me isn’t worthy of me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: He who seeks his life will lose it; and he who loses his life for my sake will find it.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: “He who receives you receives me, and he who receives me receives him who sent me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: He who receives a prophet in the name of a prophet will receive a prophet’s reward. He who receives a righteous man in the name of a righteous man will receive a righteous man’s reward.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Whoever gives one of these little ones just a cup of cold water to drink in the name of a disciple, most certainly I tell you, he will in no way lose his reward.
segments.speaker: Jesus
